item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 19min So, one of the best nines in golf is on your television tonight Pasatiempo Golf C
item.description: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 19min So, one of the best nines in golf is on your television tonight Pasatiempo Golf Club 2 27 3 mil

Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 1min En respuesta a @fried_egg_golf y @PasatiempoGolf Actually, even better. Instead of just watching it, you can come play Pasatiempo with us on July 27. Limited spots still available: De thefriedegg.com 2 464

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 8min Think about this...
Scottie Scheffler has spent 186 weeks at World Number One.
Phi
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 8min Think about this...
Scottie Scheffler has spent 186 weeks at World Number One.
Phil Mickelson never reached No. 1 but he spent 270 weeks at World Number Two. 8 447
